nodes.label: .`postLocation ignores an older fix that arrives after a newer one`()
.`postLocation accepts a fix with the same timestamp as a corrected reading`()
.`postLocation always saves when the new fix timestamp is unparseable`()
.`postLocation writes the fix to the queue before attempting the network call`()
.`postLocation removes the queued row once the upload succeeds`()
.`postLocation keeps the queued row on a transient 5xx failure`()
.`postLocation drops the queued row on a non-retryable 4xx failure`()
.`postLocation surfaces TrackingNotAllowedException for a Force Location rejection`()
.`postLocation surfaces SessionInvalidException for a dead token`()
.`postLocation keeps the queued row when the network call throws`()
.`syncOfflineLocations drains queued rows for the current user on success`()
